---
title: "Hello, world"
description: "A first post — what this site is for."
date: "2026-06-22"
categories: [meta]
draft: false
---

This is the first post on my new site. I plan to use this space for short notes
on my research, things I'm reading, and the occasional project or side interest.

Because the site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), posts can mix prose
with live code. For example, here's a chunk of R — set `eval: true` and add R to
the build (or just render locally and commit the output) to make it run:

```{r}
#| eval: false
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(mpg, aes(displ, hwy, colour = class)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal()
```

To add another post, copy the `posts/welcome/` folder, rename it, and edit the
front matter (`title`, `date`, `categories`). The [Blog](../../blog.qmd) page
picks it up automatically.
